name: Rising Nonferrous Metals Share Co.,Ltd.
summary: Rising Nonferrous Metals Share Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, mining, smelting, trading, and warehousing of non-ferrous metals. Its products include medium and heavy rare earth metals, and tungsten products. The company holds five tungsten mines. Rising Nonferrous Metals Share Co.,Ltd. is based in Guangzhou, China.
